traits: Carnivores and omnivores heal 5% max HP over 2 seconds after killing an enemy.
Aquatic and semi-aquatic creatures gain 15% move speed in water.
Semi-aquatic creatures have limited swim time before needing air.
Birds take off by holding Space and moving 2 units.
Airborne birds pass over obstacles and enemies and avoid ground physical attacks except during low attack windows.
Mosquito swarms and fireflies are always flying but can still be hit by physical attacks.

creatures.name: Bullfrog
creatures.primary: Directional bite; body turns to face attack.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.summary: Jump 4 units while moving, or 10 units toward cursor from camouflage. Non-damaging obstacle hop.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.summary: Lunge up to 3 units, stop on collision, deal 15 damage in 3x2 impact and knock back 1 unit.

passives.name: Swallow
passives.summary: Execute lower-base-HP enemies below 10% on next attack and heal 25% max HP.

passives.name: Camouflage
passives.summary: Standing still 3 seconds without damage/action makes bullfrog mostly invisible until action, movement, or damage.

creatures.name: Chorus Frog
creatures.primary: Tongue poke that deals damage at the tongue tip.

abilities.name: Comb Call
abilities.summary: Self and allies within 6 units gain 10% move speed and attack speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Cree
abilities.summary: Enemies within 8 units deal 10% less damage and move 10% slower for 6 seconds.

creatures.name: Newt
creatures.primary: Alternating tail swing from back to front.

abilities.name: Unken Reflex
abilities.summary: Stop, flip over, become invulnerable for 3 seconds, and force nearby enemies away.

abilities.name: Toxic Secretion
abilities.summary: For 5 seconds, physical attackers take 60% of their dealt damage over 3 seconds.

passives.name: Rib Exudation
passives.summary: Enemy that drops newt to 10% or lower takes 50 burst plus 60% reflected damage over 3 seconds; 10s cooldown.

passives.name: Caudal Autotomy
passives.summary: Would-be death instead removes tail, disables attacking, and grants 15% speed for 10 seconds; 25s cooldown.

creatures.name: Cane Toad
creatures.primary: Thin poison stream with lingering 2 second damage; 10 ammo per second fired.

abilities.name: Toxic Skin
abilities.summary: For 10 seconds, physical attackers receive stackable poison up to 3 stacks, 20 damage over 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Thanatosis
abilities.summary: Immobile for 5 seconds but can primary/Q; primary range doubles and Toxic Skin deals 5% more.

passives.name: Bufotoxin
passives.summary: Physical attackers receive 24 poison damage over 2 seconds, stacking up to 5.

creatures.name: Snapping Turtle
creatures.primary: Head retracts as 0.7s visual cue, then neck bite extends in aimed direction and stops on impact.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.summary: Next attack reaches 1.5 units farther; on hit latches and pulls target in front.

abilities.name: Lingual Lure
abilities.summary: For 1.5s, cannot attack/ability but can move; enemies in 1.5 radius are stunned.

passives.name: Protective Shell
passives.summary: Take 15% less damage from all sources.

creatures.name: Water Snake

stats.primary_damage: 1% target max HP per second while latched

creatures.primary: Bite and bleed; holding LMB latches on hit. Lower-base-HP targets can be dragged; higher-base-HP targets drag the snake.

abilities.name: Musking
abilities.summary: Not usable while latched. Enemies in 3 radius are forced away for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Slithering Retreat
abilities.summary: Gain 20% move speed for 5 seconds.

passives.name: Ingestion
passives.summary: Every 20s, eat a latched lower-base-HP target under 15% HP, killing it and healing 85% of enemy max HP.

creatures.name: Bog Turtle
creatures.primary: Headbutt for 2 damage and 2 self-damage. While basking, heals ally 20 and grants stackable 2% damage for 2s.

abilities.name: Endozoochory
abilities.summary: Launch poop to location within 6 units. On ground it becomes a flower after 2s; allies touch for 20% max HP heal.

abilities.name: Umbrella Effect
abilities.summary: Only while basking. Heal self for all missing HP, then heal mounted ally by that amount.

passives.name: Basking
passives.summary: Press R near higher-base-HP ally to ride them. Receive ally damage at 95% reduction; ignore drowning and can be carried in flight.

creatures.name: Alligator
creatures.primary: Single-target burst bite latch; hold LMB to drag for 3 seconds before release.

abilities.name: Death Roll
abilities.summary: If grabbed enemy is in water, roll for 5 seconds and deal 30 damage per second.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.summary: Become invisible but still hittable. Stealth breaks on hit, attack, or ability. Move 30% slower.

passives.name: Devour
passives.summary: Each enemy killed heals alligator for 50% of killed enemy max HP.

creatures.name: Owl

stats.range: 1 unit impact, 6 unit swoop target radius

creatures.primary: Ground peck or aimed flying/perched swoop with 0.7s low counter-hit window.

abilities.name: Silent Flight
abilities.summary: Only while flying. Invisible and silent for 10 seconds until attacked, attacking, ability use, or grounding.

abilities.name: Auditory Mapping
abilities.summary: Reveal enemies, minions, and wildlife within 12 radius for 3 seconds.

passives.name: Perch
passives.summary: Stop on terrain while flying; cannot be hurt by ground attacks and gains 50% vision.

creatures.name: Great Blue Heron
creatures.primary: Grounded spear-like beak strike. Cannot attack while flying.

abilities.name: Powder Puff
abilities.summary: Cleanse negative effects and gain stun/disruption immunity for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Flushing
abilities.summary: Grounded only. Dash 2 units in aimed direction and start flying without takeoff.

passives.name: Wading
passives.summary: While grounded, can walk through water and attack enemies in water without issues.

creatures.name: Kingfisher
creatures.primary: Peck while grounded or flying; +30% damage after moving 2 units. Low impact counter-hit window applies.

abilities.name: Hover
abilities.summary: Enter idle airborne state for up to 4 seconds; movement transitions into free flight.

abilities.name: Nest Chamber
abilities.summary: Burrow underground for 7 seconds, untargetable and immune; exits grounded.

passives.name: Plunge
passives.summary: Can attack and damage characters in water.

creatures.name: Duck

stats.range: 1.5 unit wing arc or 1 unit bite

creatures.primary: Cannot attack while flying. Alternates right wing, left wing, front bite.

abilities.name: Nesting
abilities.summary: Idle 4s to place nest with up to 4 eggs that hatch into 80 HP ducklings.

abilities.name: Mobbing
abilities.summary: Next landed primary gives ducklings 85% damage reduction and 20% speed/attack speed for 6s.

passives.name: Paddling
passives.summary: Duck and ducklings safely traverse water.

creatures.name: Water Shrew
creatures.primary: Bite applies 3% move slow, 2% damage decrease, and 2% increased damage taken for 2s, up to 3 stacks.

abilities.name: Water Walk
abilities.summary: Gain 35% speed for 4s and run on water while moving. Idling drops into water and ends effect.

abilities.name: Proenkephalin A
abilities.summary: Next landed basic prevents movement and ability use for 1s; target can still attack.

passives.name: Aquatic Locomotion
passives.summary: Can swim and gains swim speed boost.

creatures.name: Beaver
creatures.primary: Directional chomp.

abilities.name: Tail Slap
abilities.summary: Allies within 8 units gain 15% damage reduction for 4s. Repairs nearby dams by 20% current health.

abilities.name: Dam
abilities.summary: Place rotatable 200 HP wall within 4 units. Blocks physical/ground attacks. Max 3 placed.

passives.name: Gnawing
passives.summary: Basic attacks on trees heal 5% per bite.

creatures.name: Otter
creatures.primary: Bite and latch up to 2 seconds before being thrown off.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.summary: Alternating back-to-front tail arc hits multiple targets and knocks back 1.5 units.

abilities.name: Gang Up
abilities.summary: Next hit makes all otters latch to the target, deal damage, and immobilize for 2s.

passives.name: Pack of 3
passives.summary: Player controls leader plus 2 followers. Control swaps to unlatched otter after latch. Latched otters take 20% less damage and slow target 25% each.

creatures.name: Mink
creatures.primary: Directional bite.

abilities.name: Choke
abilities.summary: Dash 2 units; on contact deal 20 and latch to neck. If 10s countdown completes, target dies.
abilities.cooldown: after release, equal to latch duration

abilities.name: Scent Marking
abilities.summary: Allies in 4 radius take 10% less and deal 5% more for 6s; enemies have healing reduced 40% for 6s.

passives.name: Fearless
passives.summary: Higher-base-HP targets deal 15% less to mink and take 12% more from mink.

creatures.name: Leech

footprint.note: per leech; cluster visual scales with count

creatures.primary: Fire a leech projectile that sticks for 3 seconds. Multiple leeches stack.

abilities.name: Copulation
abilities.summary: Idle up to 5 seconds and spawn 1 leech per second unless max count is reached.

abilities.name: Sensory Crypt
abilities.summary: Water only. Send a leech to every target in same water body; latches 6s and reveals enemies. Costs 1 body-leech per target hit.

passives.name: Cluster
passives.summary: The 20 leeches are both health and ability/attack resource. Each hit removes one leech.

creatures.name: Crayfish
creatures.primary: Alternating right/left claw pinch.

abilities.name: Caridoid Escape
abilities.summary: Backward dash 3 units. If target is within 1 unit in facing direction, smack for 20.

abilities.name: Meral Display
abilities.summary: Claws-up stance for up to 10s: forward/back only, +30% size, +5% speed, 30% DR.

passives.name: Molting
passives.summary: Every 30s alive grants 2% DR up to 5 stacks after a brief vulnerable molt window.

creatures.name: Mosquito Swarm

footprint.note: scales slightly with current health per Unswattable

creatures.primary: Slow projectile expands into 3 radius mosquito AOE for 3s on max range, target, or object hit; slows 5%.

abilities.name: Breeding Grounds
abilities.summary: For 6 seconds, leave a trail of AOE mosquitos behind while moving. Trail lingers 3 seconds after the duration ends.

abilities.name: Deposit
abilities.summary: Within 1 unit of an ally, deposit stored blood to heal them; 50 burst at full blood meter, scaled down by amount available. Blood meter (separate from hunger) fills from primary AOE, Breeding Grounds, and Unswattable contact damage. Depositing does not drain hunger.

passives.name: Unswattable
passives.summary: Moves through units/objects, still takes physical hits, direct ranged attacks have 9% miss chance, contact deals 10 DPS, fills hunger and blood meter. Hitbox shrinks/grows slightly with current health.

creatures.name: Wolf Spider
creatures.primary: Lunge 2 units and bite. Holding click latches up to 3s, applying ramping slow.

abilities.name: Silk-lined Burrows
abilities.summary: Create hidden burrows, enter/exit, charge targets within 4 units, and maintain up to 4 burrows.

abilities.name: Epigamic Carrying
abilities.summary: Carry 12 eggs; after 10s hatch spiderlings that rush enemies. Burrow hatch stores trap until triggered.

passives.name: Simple Eyes
passives.summary: Sees 20 units in facing direction with full clarity day or night.

creatures.name: Firefly
creatures.primary: Slow firefly projectile follows hit target for 2s and reveals them.

abilities.name: Flash-Train
abilities.summary: Glow radius increases to 7, healing improves 15%, allies gain 5% speed. Lasts 8s.

abilities.name: Glowworms
abilities.summary: Place glowworm mine. On hit, explodes into 3 radius 4s slow field with 40% slow and 10% vulnerability.

passives.name: Bioluminescence
passives.summary: Constant 4 radius light. Allies in radius receive 20 HP/sec.
